visualizerParams.title: Optimizing Multi-Input AND Gate
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The provided multi-input AND gate uses Python's built-in `all()`. Refactor it to implement the logic using a manual `for` loop for better understanding of the short-circuiting behavior.

solution.explanation: This manual loop clearly shows the short-circuit behavior: as soon as we find a 0 (False), we can immediately return 0 without checking the rest of the inputs. This is exactly what the built-in `all()` function does internally in C.
